title: National Cybersecurity Strategy Republic of Botswana
description: Botswana's National Cybersecurity Strategy (approved October 2020), hosted in the ITU national-strategies repository. Sets a framework for secure cyberspace, awareness and capacity building. No explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography reference found. Domestic issuer (Government of Botswana) but not PQC-explicit.

title: National Cybersecurity Strategy | Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority
description: BOCRA (telecom/ICT regulator) page presenting Botswana's National Cybersecurity Strategy. Domestic official issuer. No explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content found.

title: bw CIRT | Botswana Communications Regulatory Authority
description: BOCRA page on the Botswana national Computer Incident Response Team (bw-CIRT). Domestic official issuer. No explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content found.

title: The approved National Cybersecurity Strategy is now available! | BWCirt
description: BwCIRT (Botswana national CERT) announcement of the approved National Cybersecurity Strategy. Domestic official issuer. No explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography content found.

title: Botswana National CIRT Assessment - Cybil Portal
description: Third-party (GFCE Cybil Portal) project record on Botswana's national CIRT assessment. Not a domestic Botswana institutional source and no PQC reference.

title: ISO - BOBS - Botswana Bureau of Standards
description: ISO member page for the Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS), the national standards body. No BOBS post-quantum cryptography standard found; page is an ISO membership record.

title: Home - BOBS
description: Botswana Bureau of Standards (BOBS) official homepage, national standards body. No post-quantum / quantum-safe cryptography standard or content found.

title: Ministry of Communications, Knowledge and Technology (Botswana)
description: Wikipedia overview of the ministry handling Botswana's digital/ICT policy (SmartBots 4IR strategy, National AI work). Not an official institutional source; no PQC reference.
